name: Lettuce Butter Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the lettuce leaves.
2. Wash and dry the lettuce thoroughly.
3. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
- The chopped lettuce will yield about 8 cups.
4. Melt the butter in a wide saucepan over medium heat.
5. Add the garlic and stir for one minute.
6. Stir in the lettuce until it is evenly coated with butter.
7. Add the sour cream and nutmeg, stirring to combine.
8. Cook over medium heat until the lettuce is warm but still crunchy.
Per serving: 68 calories, 3.5g carbohydrates, 6g fat, 67.8mg calcium, 1.4mg iron, 1.3g fiber
SERVES: 4
